title: What Perseverance Is Hunting on Mars
script_summary: Discover how NASA's Perseverance rover is exploring Jezero Crater for ancient signs of life.

segments.voiceover: NASA's Perseverance isn't joyriding — it's hunting ancient signs of life.
Situated in Jezero Crater, this rover is on a mission to unveil the secrets of Mars' watery past.
Jezero was once a lake, and scientists believe it may hold clues to ancient microbial life.
Perseverance collects rock samples, caching them for future return missions to Earth.
What will these samples reveal? The answers could change everything we know about life beyond Earth.
While no life has been found yet, Perseverance is paving the way for discovery.
Follow along for more updates on this incredible journey to Mars!
